name: Custom Image Assessment Pipeline
description: Assessment flow that uses a custom role execution image for the delivery step.
outcome: A custom-image role participates in the same generic assessment contract as default-image roles.

definition.process_instructions: The build engineer runs in a custom execution image. The release assessor evaluates the linked subject output before rollout can continue.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: build-validation
stages.goal: The build output is delivered and assessed.
